Package recoder.service

Class DefaultErrorHandler

java.lang.Object
recoder.service.DefaultErrorHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ErrorHandler, ModelUpdateListener
public class DefaultErrorHandler extends Object implements ErrorHandler

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DefaultErrorHandler()
     
    DefaultErrorHandler(int errorThreshold)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    errorMessage(Exception e)
    Issues an error message when the specified exception is not ignored, but the system will continue to find further errors.
    protected void
    exitAction()
    Called when too many errors occurred or the model update has finished and there were non-ignorable errors.
    protected int
    getErrorCount()
    Returns the current error count.
    int
    getErrorThreshold()
    Returns the number of errors that this error handler accepts before stopping the current analysis.
    protected boolean
    isIgnorable(Exception e)
    Redefine this method to filter exceptions that are not considered as an error.
    protected boolean
    isReferingUnavailableCode(ModelElement me)
    Redefine this method to indicate that the specified element refers to unavailable code.
    protected boolean
    isTemplateCode(ProgramElement pe)
    Redefine this method to indicate that the specified element belongs to a code template.
    void
    modelUpdated(EventObject event)
    Informs the listener that the meta model has been updated.
    void
    modelUpdating(EventObject event)
    Informs the listener that the meta model is now being updated.
    void
    reportError(Exception e)
    Handles exceptions and may return so that the callee can attempt to resume or fail, throwing the given error as an exception.
    void
    setErrorThreshold(int maxCount)
    Sets the number of errors that this error handler accepts before stopping the current analysis.
    protected void
    warningMessage(Exception e)
    Issues a warning message when the specified exception is ignored.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultErrorHandler

      public DefaultErrorHandler()

    • DefaultErrorHandler

      public DefaultErrorHandler(int errorThreshold)

  • Method Details

    • getErrorCount

      protected int getErrorCount()
      Returns the current error count.

    • getErrorThreshold

      public int getErrorThreshold()
      Description copied from interface: ErrorHandler
      Returns the number of errors that this error handler accepts before stopping the current analysis.
      Specified by:
      getErrorThreshold in interface ErrorHandler

    • setErrorThreshold

      public void setErrorThreshold(int maxCount)
      Description copied from interface: ErrorHandler
      Sets the number of errors that this error handler accepts before stopping the current analysis. Setting this value to zero results in a fail at once behavior.
      Specified by:
      setErrorThreshold in interface ErrorHandler

    • isReferingUnavailableCode

      protected boolean isReferingUnavailableCode(ModelElement me)
      Redefine this method to indicate that the specified element refers to unavailable code. This suppresses corresponding unresolved reference errors. The default implementation returns false.

    • isTemplateCode

      protected boolean isTemplateCode(ProgramElement pe)
      Redefine this method to indicate that the specified element belongs to a code template. This suppresses corresponding unresolved reference errors. The default implementation returns false.

    • isIgnorable

      protected boolean isIgnorable(Exception e)
      Redefine this method to filter exceptions that are not considered as an error. The default implementation checks for UnresolvedReferenceExceptions and returns true if the cause is either part of an incomplete model or contained in template code.
      See Also:
      • isReferingUnavailableCode(recoder.ModelElement)
      • isTemplateCode(recoder.java.ProgramElement)

    • warningMessage

      protected void warningMessage(Exception e)
      Issues a warning message when the specified exception is ignored. The default implementation writes a note to stderr.

    • errorMessage

      protected void errorMessage(Exception e)
      Issues an error message when the specified exception is not ignored, but the system will continue to find further errors. The default implementation writes a note to stderr.

    • exitAction

      protected void exitAction()
      Called when too many errors occurred or the model update has finished and there were non-ignorable errors. The default implementation writes a message to stderr and throws a model exception.

    • reportError

      public void reportError(Exception e)
      Description copied from interface: ErrorHandler
      Handles exceptions and may return so that the callee can attempt to resume or fail, throwing the given error as an exception.
      Specified by:
      reportError in interface ErrorHandler
      Parameters:
      e - an error cause.

    • modelUpdating

      public void modelUpdating(EventObject event)
      Description copied from interface: ModelUpdateListener
      Informs the listener that the meta model is now being updated.
      Specified by:
      modelUpdating in interface ModelUpdateListener
      Parameters:
      event - an event object containing the change history service as source.

    • modelUpdated

      public void modelUpdated(EventObject event)
      Description copied from interface: ModelUpdateListener
      Informs the listener that the meta model has been updated.
      Specified by:
      modelUpdated in interface ModelUpdateListener
      Parameters:
      event - an event object containing the change history service as source.
